text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've successfully made my debut, but I really
worried Trainer and my parents, who came to see
me race.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It seems my body is still too underdeveloped and
can't bear the stress of racing. I won't be of any
help to Trainer at this rate...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But if I run well in a big G1 race like the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies, I'm sure they'll be more awed than
worried about me... right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is rooting for me too. I hope I can run a
lot more races and make plenty of flowers burst
into full bloom.
